name: Jorick Sparrowthief
sd_appearance: A diminutive halfling, Jorick Sparrowthief, with piercing green eyes and a patchwork coat, stands hunched over a weathered table, his ink-stained hands and reinforced elbows evident as he meticulously sorts through a stack of ancient scrolls. His scholar's robes, faded pale blue and adorned with brass instrument clips and glass-lens goggles, hang loosely on his wiry frame. A dagger, a last resort, peeks from the folds of his robes, while multiple scroll cases dangle from his belt. A pair of magnifying lenses rests on the table, reflecting the flickering candlelight, casting an eerie glow upon his determined visage.
faction_visual: pale blue scholar robes, brass instrument clips, glass-lens goggles, ink-stained hands
style_note: ink-stained hands, reading lenses, reinforced elbows, multiple scroll cases
